description: Every Semrush Analytics + Projects feature, plus a local SQLite store and cross-domain joins no other Semrush tool has.

novel_features.name: Weekly Drift Report
novel_features.description: Diff this week's domain + keyword snapshot against last week's to see what moved, without re-spending credits on the data you already pulled.

novel_features.name: Snapshot Tag + Diff
novel_features.description: Tag the current local-store state of any resource (e.g. monday-baseline) and later diff any two tags to see exactly what moved between them.

novel_features.name: Backlink Delta Since Last Sync
novel_features.description: Show only the referring domains and backlinks first seen in a window, so the 'did anything new link to us this week' question is a one-liner.

novel_features.name: Budget Ledger
novel_features.description: Every API call's documented unit cost is logged locally; budget rolls up spend by day, command, resource, and projects month-end burn from the current balance probe.

novel_features.name: Keyword Gap
novel_features.description: Set-difference of organic keywords across two or more domains in the same database, with intersection and unique-to-each modes.

novel_features.name: Backlink Gap
novel_features.description: Find referring domains that link to a competitor but not to you, filtered by authority score.

novel_features.name: Audit Triage
novel_features.description: Rank Site Audit pages by weighted issue severity (errors x3, warnings x1, notices x0.1) so you fix the highest-impact pages first.

novel_features.name: Position Drift
novel_features.description: Window-function over Position Tracking snapshots: which keywords moved more than N positions, dropped off page 1, or entered page 1, per region and device.

novel_features.name: Country Fan-out
novel_features.description: Run Domain Overview across multiple country databases in one shot, persist all rows with the database key so later cross-region drift queries work.

novel_features.name: SERP Feature Monitor
novel_features.description: Time-series view of which SERP features (featured snippet, People Also Ask, video, image pack) have appeared and disappeared for a tracked keyword.

novel_features.name: Cannibalization Detector
novel_features.description: List phrases where the same domain ranks for multiple URLs (a known SEO problem) with the URLs and their respective positions.

novel_features.name: Audit Regression Watch
novel_features.description: Diff the latest two Site Audit snapshots for a project: new issue IDs introduced, issues resolved, count delta per severity.
